code:
import io
import string

fn is_space(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Bool
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    b == 32 or b == 9
  when None
    false
  end
end

match io.read_line()
when Some(line)
  mut out = ""
  mut i = 0
  mut first = true
  let n = string.len(line)
  while i < n
    while i < n and is_space(line, i)
      i = i + 1
    end
    if i < n
      let start = i
      while i < n and not is_space(line, i)
        i = i + 1
      end
      let tok = string.substring(line, start, i)
      if first
        out = "#{tok} #{tok}"
        first = false
      else
        out = "#{out} #{tok} #{tok}"
      end
    end
  end
  println(out)
when None
  println("")
end
